diagnosis: Rotor imbalance developing — vibration trending upward over past 3 days.
recommended_action: Schedule dynamic balancing within 5 days. Monitor vibration daily. Inspect mounting bolts.

supporting_evidence.description: Vibration at 4.8 mm/s, above warning threshold of 4.5 mm/s
Last balancing performed over 2 weeks ago

diagnosis: Worsening rotor imbalance — vibration signature consistent with progressive mass asymmetry.
recommended_action: Balancing required within 48 hours. If vibration exceeds 7.0 mm/s, shut down immediately.

supporting_evidence.description: Vibration at 5.5 mm/s — 22% above warning threshold
Motor current elevated 19% above nominal — increased mechanical load

diagnosis: Systematic fault detected — error 'W_VIBRATION_ELEVATED' has occurred 3 times
recommended_action: Investigate root cause of recurring fault. Check related subsystem components and wiring. Review maintenance history.

supporting_evidence.description: Error code 'W_VIBRATION_ELEVATED' recurred 3 times — indicates unresolved underlying fault
